title: README policy should consolidate into the top-level template README
summary: Choose option (b): move the useful level-helper guidance from the four rendered level README files into .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/templates/README.md with per-level subsections. The files are helper documentation, not runtime templates, and should be excluded from golden parity. Keeping them as orphan docs preserves confusing rendered-dir path contracts; deleting them entirely loses useful local guidance.

title: Exact per-level deletion budget is 25 markdown files and 4,087 LOC
summary: The requested find and wc commands over the four rendered level directories measured exactly 25 markdown files and 4,087 LOC. This replaces the prior approximate per-level deletion phrasing.

title: Phase 4 needs separate per-level and broader deletion budgets
summary: Deleting only the four rendered level directories removes 25 markdown files and 4,087 LOC. The earlier about-60-file and about-7K-LOC scenario can only describe a broader cleanup that also removes other duplicate generated surfaces, and that broader scope needs a separate inventory before implementation.

title: Canonical research synthesis is ready for final polish
summary: The canonical synthesis now fills all 17 requested sections and incorporates iteration 1 through iteration 8 evidence, the README policy decision, and measured deletion-budget numbers. Iteration 10 should be a polish and convergence pass, not a new discovery pass.
